MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff SIMPSON GUMPERTZ & HEGER INC.'S Motion for Order that the Genuineness of Documents and Truth of Facts Be Admitted and Compelling Responses to Interrogatories and Production of Documents and for Monetary Sanctions Including Attorneys' Fees is Off calendar at the request of the moving party.
